calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2020 Off Calendar

MOTION - Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Successor-In-Interest For Deceased Plaintiff
Off Calendar Dec-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrew Chew of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs and moving party Jerry Camp and Flora Camp.

RULING: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER SUBSTITUTING SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST FOR DECEASED PLAINTIFF
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' Motion for Order Substituting Successor-In-Interest for Deceased Plaintiff is GRANTED. Deanna Lee Kisling is substituted as successor-in-interest for deceased plaintiff, Jerry Camp pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 377.31. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
